name: Intel and AMD Server Benchmarks (September 2007)
description: Kastner-authored Excel spreadsheet comparing Intel Xeon 7140M dual-core, Xeon 7350 quad-core, and AMD Opteron 8220se dual-core and Barcelona 8222 across SQL Server database, ERP SAP-SD, Java SPECjbb, Integer SPECint_rate_2006, and SPEC webserver 2005 benchmarks. Includes DP chipset RAS feature comparison for Intel 5000X, 5000P, and 5000V. Primary document of Intel's quad-core lead over AMD's first-generation Barcelona in 2007.
